sentences.arabic: يَتَمَيَّزُ الْقُرْآنُ الْكَرِيمُ بِلُغَةٍ عَرَبِيَّةٍ فَصِيحَةٍ جِدًّا.
sentences.translation: Časni Kur'an se odlikuje veoma rječitim arapskim jezikom.
sentences.translationEn: The Holy Quran is characterized by a very eloquent Arabic language.

sentences.arabic: تَأَثَّرَ الْأُدَبَاءُ بِمُفْرَدَاتِهِ وَأُسْلُوبِهِ الْبَلِيغِ فِي كِتَابَاتِهِمْ.
sentences.translation: Književnici su u svojim djelima bili pod utjecajem njegovog rječnika i elokventnog stila.
sentences.translationEn: Writers were influenced by its vocabulary and eloquent style in their writings.

sentences.arabic: يَسْتَخْدِمُ الْقُرْآنُ الْأَمْثَالَ لِيَشْرَحَ لِلنَّاسِ أُمُورَ الدِّينِ وَالدُّنْيَا.
sentences.translation: Kur'an koristi primjere kako bi ljudima objasnio vjerska i dunjalučka pitanja.
sentences.translationEn: The Quran uses parables to explain matters of religion and the world to people.

sentences.arabic: يَتَعَلَّمُ الدَّارِسُونَ قَوَاعِدَ النَّحْوِ وَالصَّرْفِ مِنْ آيَاتِهِ.
sentences.translation: Učenici uče pravila gramatike i morfologije iz njegovih ajeta.
sentences.translationEn: Students learn the rules of grammar and morphology from its verses.

sentences.arabic: يَبْقَى هَذَا النَّصُّ مَصْدَرًا أَسَاسِيًّا لِكُلِّ مَنْ يُرِيدُ إِتْقَانَ الْفُصْحَى.
sentences.translation: Ovaj tekst ostaje osnovni izvor za svakoga ko želi usavršiti književni arapski jezik.
sentences.translationEn: This text remains a primary source for anyone who wants to master Modern Standard Arabic.
